diagrams.title: Thrashing Performance Curve
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between CPU utilization and degree of multiprogramming
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how thrashing occurs when too many processes are loaded and why optimal point matters

diagrams.title: Thrashing Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular flow showing how thrashing perpetuates itself
elements: Process needs page → Page Fault → I/O to disk → Load page → Brief execution → Process needs another page → Repeat cycle
diagrams.purpose: Understand that thrashing is a self-reinforcing cycle that must be broken with intervention

diagrams.title: Working Set Concept
diagrams.description: Sliding window showing which pages are in current working set
elements: Timeline with sliding window of size τ
Pages P1, P2, P3 inside window = Working Set
Pages outside window = Not recently used
diagrams.purpose: Visualize what working set means and why insufficient frames cause thrashing
